Spring Data Elasticsearch
  1. org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.document

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.document.Document

Packages that use Document
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
This package contains classes that use the new Elasticsearch client library (co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java) to access Elasticsearch.
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert

    Subinterfaces with type arguments of type Document in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.event
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    AfterLoadCallback<T>
    Callback being invoked after a Document is read from Elasticsearch and before it is converted into a domain object.
    interface 
    ReactiveAfterLoadCallback<T>
    Callback being invoked after a Document is read from Elasticsearch and before it is converted into a domain object.
